Barbarian.name: Path of the Berserker
Barbarian.description: A primal path centered on unstoppable fury and punishing melee pressure.
Barbarian.feature_summary: Frenzy at 3rd level for an extra melee attack while raging.

Barbarian.name: Path of the Totem Warrior
Barbarian.description: A spiritual path that bonds you to totem spirits for situational resilience.
Barbarian.feature_summary: Spirit Seeker and Totem Spirit choices begin at 3rd level.

Bard.name: College of Lore
Bard.description: A scholar-performer tradition focused on knowledge and cutting words.
Bard.feature_summary: Bonus proficiencies and Cutting Words at 3rd level.

Bard.name: College of Valor
Bard.description: A martial bardic college blending inspiration with frontline combat.
Bard.feature_summary: Medium armor, shields, martial weapons, and Combat Inspiration.

Cleric.name: Life Domain
Cleric.description: Divine service focused on healing and sustaining allies.
Cleric.feature_summary: Bonus healing and heavy armor proficiency at early levels.

Cleric.name: Light Domain
Cleric.description: A radiant domain emphasizing fire, light, and protective brilliance.
Cleric.feature_summary: Warding Flare provides defensive reaction utility.

Druid.name: Circle of the Land
Druid.description: A circle of versatile spellcasters aligned to natural terrains.
Druid.feature_summary: Natural Recovery improves spell slot endurance.

Druid.name: Circle of the Moon
Druid.description: A shapechanging-focused circle that empowers Wild Shape combat use.
Druid.feature_summary: Combat Wild Shape and stronger beast forms early.

Fighter.name: Champion
Fighter.description: A straightforward archetype emphasizing physical excellence and critical hits.
Fighter.feature_summary: Improved Critical increases crit range to 19-20.

Fighter.name: Battle Master
Fighter.description: A tactical fighter using maneuvers and superiority dice.
Fighter.feature_summary: Combat Superiority and Student of War at 3rd level.

Monk.name: Way of the Open Hand
Monk.description: A disciplined style focused on precision strikes and battlefield control.
Monk.feature_summary: Open Hand Technique augments Flurry of Blows.

Monk.name: Way of Shadow
Monk.description: A stealth-focused monastic path with darkness and infiltration themes.
Monk.feature_summary: Shadow Arts expands utility through ki-powered spells.

Paladin.name: Oath of Devotion
Paladin.description: A sacred oath of virtue, honesty, and courage.
Paladin.feature_summary: Holy themes and defensive aura progression.

Paladin.name: Oath of the Ancients
Paladin.description: A nature-infused oath defending light and life.
Paladin.feature_summary: Nature-themed spells and anti-magic defenses over time.

Ranger.name: Hunter
Ranger.description: A pragmatic archetype for relentless pursuit and target elimination.
Ranger.feature_summary: Choose offensive or defensive hunter tactics at 3rd level.

Ranger.name: Beast Master
Ranger.description: A bonded ranger who fights alongside an animal companion.
Ranger.feature_summary: Ranger's Companion establishes a combat partner.

Rogue.name: Thief
Rogue.description: An agile rogue focused on mobility, infiltration, and object use.
Rogue.feature_summary: Fast Hands and Second-Story Work at 3rd level.

Rogue.name: Assassin
Rogue.description: A lethal rogue archetype built around surprise and precision kills.

Sorcerer.name: Draconic Bloodline
Sorcerer.description: Innate magic tied to draconic ancestry and resilience.
Sorcerer.feature_summary: Extra HP and enhanced AC scaling through draconic heritage.

Sorcerer.name: Wild Magic
Sorcerer.description: Unstable arcane talent with chaotic magical surges.
Sorcerer.feature_summary: Wild Magic Surge and Tides of Chaos at early levels.

Warlock.name: The Fiend
Warlock.description: A pact with infernal power granting survivability and destructive spells.
Warlock.feature_summary: Dark One's Blessing grants temporary hit points on takedowns.

Warlock.name: The Archfey
Warlock.description: A pact with fey entities emphasizing charm and trickery.
Warlock.feature_summary: Fey Presence offers short-range control effects.

Wizard.name: School of Evocation
Wizard.description: Specialization in explosive elemental and force-based spellcraft.
Wizard.feature_summary: Sculpt Spells protects allies from your area effects.

Wizard.name: School of Abjuration
Wizard.description: Specialization in wards, barriers, and anti-magic techniques.
Wizard.feature_summary: Arcane Ward provides scalable protective buffering.
